content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift:1 SecureField) but demo credentials are placeholders ("test"/"changeme") and notes.txt just says "TBD" (fastlane/metadata/review_information/).
Pierre: Apple's reviewer must actually log in to test your app, and placeholder credentials like "test"/"changeme" with "TBD" notes will almost certainly cause a rejection for missing/incomplete demo access. Provide a real working demo account, and add notes explaining any steps needed to reach gated features (paywalls, special flows, etc.). Update these before submission.
